sql: CREATE TABLE taxonomy (taxonomy_id TEXT PRIMARY KEY, parent_taxonomy_id TEXT, taxonomy_type TEXT, level_scope TEXT, code TEXT, display_name TEXT, description TEXT, sort_order INTEGER, active BOOLEAN);

CREATE TABLE lessons (lesson_id TEXT PRIMARY KEY, module_id TEXT, taxonomy_id TEXT, level TEXT, title TEXT, short_summary TEXT, why_it_matters TEXT, must_know_points TEXT, red_flags TEXT, contraindications_or_dangers TEXT, common_mistakes TEXT, field_pearls TEXT, difficulty_1_to_5 INTEGER, verification_status TEXT, review_date TEXT, national_vs_local_flag TEXT, deprecated_flag BOOLEAN);

CREATE TABLE scenarios (scenario_id TEXT PRIMARY KEY, taxonomy_id TEXT, level TEXT, age_group TEXT, special_population_flags TEXT, setting TEXT, dispatch_information TEXT, scene_cues TEXT, safety_hazards TEXT, initial_impression TEXT, difficulty_1_to_5 INTEGER, terminal_outcome_type TEXT, verification_status TEXT);

CREATE TABLE questions (question_id TEXT PRIMARY KEY, taxonomy_id TEXT, level TEXT, scenario_id_nullable TEXT, ecg_id_nullable TEXT, item_type TEXT, difficulty_1_to_5 INTEGER, cognitive_level TEXT, stem TEXT, answer_format TEXT, correct_answer_key TEXT, common_trap TEXT, remediation_rule_id_nullable TEXT, national_vs_local_flag TEXT, verification_status TEXT);

CREATE TABLE question_options (option_id TEXT PRIMARY KEY, question_id TEXT, option_key TEXT, option_text TEXT, display_order INTEGER, is_correct BOOLEAN, FOREIGN KEY(question_id) REFERENCES questions(question_id));

CREATE TABLE media_manifest (media_id TEXT PRIMARY KEY, asset_type TEXT, source_name TEXT, source_asset_id TEXT, file_name TEXT, folder_path TEXT, mime_type TEXT, sample_rate_hz INTEGER, channels INTEGER, duration_ms INTEGER, image_width_px INTEGER, image_height_px INTEGER, waveform_type TEXT, body_site TEXT, clinical_label TEXT, ecg_id_nullable TEXT, checksum_sha256 TEXT, anonymised_flag BOOLEAN, licence_name TEXT, licence_url TEXT, attribution_text TEXT, redistribution_allowed BOOLEAN, derivative_allowed BOOLEAN, commercial_use_allowed BOOLEAN, alt_text TEXT, caption TEXT, verification_status TEXT, review_date TEXT);
